title: codereview: sampling procedure power budget unspecified for embedded (100ms CCA)
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:265 - Normative 100ms CCA sampler on STM32WL/nRF may exceed power budget in low-power nodes. Must specify duty-cycled sampling, max samples per minute, or integration with TDMA idle slots. Robustness P3.
close_reason: Specified power-aware sampling integrated with TDMA/beacons (<=1Hz avg); no constant background sampler. Addressed in normative section. Clean passes achieved.
